domain_context: Productivity SaaS, Video Dubbing, AI Tool

hierarchy.h1_hero: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-zinc-950
hierarchy.h2_section: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-zinc-950

surfaces_and_micro_themes.marketing_header: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px delicate border-b border-black/10, shadow-sm
surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background #FFFFFF, border-collapse, 1px subtle border-black/10, NO shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color darkens.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.editor_panels: Cardless, rectangular, dense styles. Solid backgrounds, separated by 1px border-r or border-b border-black/10.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.modals_dialogs: Solid white background, sharp 1px border border-black/10, dark overlay bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm

dashboards_and_editor.strategy: Dense 'Control Room' Grid, Strict Hierarchy, Every pixel utilized
dashboards_and_editor.border_radius: rounded-sm (max 4px) to rounded-none for a sharper, technical feel
dashboards_and_editor.table_rows: h-10, text-sm, compact padding, explicit border-b border-black/5

component_strategy.buttons: Flat, sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none). Primary: bg-zinc-950 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white. Secondary: bg-white text-zinc-950 border border-zinc-200 hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:text-zinc-950.
component_strategy.inputs_forms: Shadcn UI heavily customized. Minimal padding, 1px border-black/10, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:border-black, rounded-none or rounded-sm.
component_strategy.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dense dashboards, ensuring clarity and technical precision at small sizes.
component_strategy.tables: Dense rows, JetBrains Mono for numbers/timecodes, sticky headers, subtle alternating row backgrounds or hover states.
component_strategy.video_player: Minimalist controls, integrated directly into the grid without heavy wrapper cards. Timecode in monospace.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Must explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:text-black).
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:ring-offset-1).
motion_and_interactions.marketing_motion: Framer Motion for entrance staggers, 'Tracing Beam' border effects on feature cards.

media_and_images.rules: No generic overlays. Max overlay opacity bg-black/30 or bg-white/40. No placeholder images.

hero_abstract_soundwave.description: Abstract white wavy lines with a minimal grid pattern. Excellent for a clean, light-themed tech hero section.

video_editor_screen.description: Black flat screen computer monitor, good for showcasing the app UI inside a device mockup.

professional_portrait.description: Elegant portrait of an adult businessman in a dark suit, clean background.

sound_microphone.description: Close-up of a black microphone against a white backdrop, perfect for audio recording/dubbing themes.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute using kebab-case, role-based naming.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic font Inter for headings; configure Tailwind to use Outfit for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Apply Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) strictly: Use stark white (#FFFFFF) backgrounds with 1px black borders (rgba(0,0,0,0.1)) to define areas instead of drop shadows.
For the Editor page, use a 'Control Room' grid layout: dense, cardless, and utilizing the full screen width and height. Avoid soft rounded corners.
Use JetBrains Mono for all timecodes, lengths, and technical data in the subtitle table.
For the Actor Cards in the Sidebar, use the designated accent colors (Boy: #007AFF, Girl: #FF2D55) as high-contrast flat backgrounds or solid border accents.
Ensure all buttons have explicit text colors set for both normal and hover states to maintain accessibility.
